targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM eventos_climaticos WHERE tipo='incendio' AND creado_en >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours';
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM alertas WHERE tipo IN ('Incendio satelital','Anomalía térmica') AND creado_en >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours';
SELECT MAX(intensidad) AS value FROM eventos_climaticos WHERE tipo='incendio' AND creado_en >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours';
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM eventos_climaticos WHERE fuente LIKE 'NASA_FIRMS%' AND creado_en >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours';
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM eventos_climaticos WHERE fuente LIKE 'ORORATECH%' AND creado_en >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours';
SELECT ROUND(AVG(probabilidad)::numeric,1) AS value FROM predicciones WHERE tipo='incendio' AND fecha >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour';

panels.title: Hotspots por hora (NASA FIRMS vs OroraTech)

targets.rawSql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', creado_en) AS time, CASE WHEN fuente LIKE 'NASA%' THEN 'NASA FIRMS' WHEN fuente LIKE 'ORORA%' THEN 'OroraTech' ELSE fuente END AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM eventos_climaticos WHERE tipo='incendio' AND $__timeFilter(creado_en) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', creado_en) AS time, 'FRP MW' AS metric, ROUND(AVG(intensidad)::numeric, 2) AS value FROM eventos_climaticos WHERE tipo='incendio' AND $__timeFilter(creado_en) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Parques con más alertas de incendio (24h)

targets.rawSql: SELECT p.nombre AS parque, COUNT(a.id) AS alertas, MAX(a.creado_en)::text AS ultima_alerta FROM alertas a JOIN parques p ON a.parque_id=p.id WHERE a.tipo IN ('Incendio satelital','Anomalía térmica','Riesgo extremo de incendio','Hotspot satelital dentro de parque') AND a.creado_en >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY p.nombre ORDER BY alertas DESC LIMIT 15;

WITH top AS (SELECT parque_id FROM predicciones WHERE tipo='incendio' AND fecha >= NOW() - INTERVAL '6 hours' GROUP BY parque_id ORDER BY AVG(probabilidad) DESC LIMIT 5) SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', pr.fecha) AS time, p.nombre AS metric, ROUND(AVG(pr.probabilidad)::numeric,1) AS value FROM predicciones pr JOIN parques p ON p.id=pr.parque_id JOIN top t ON t.parque_id=pr.parque_id WHERE pr.tipo='incendio' AND $__timeFilter(pr.fecha) GROUP BY 1, p.nombre ORDER BY 1;
